name: redc-plugin-clash-config
description: 场景部署后自动生成 Clash (Shadowsocks) 代理配置文件
description_en: Auto-generate Clash proxy config (Shadowsocks) after deployment
author: wgpsec

port.description: Shadowsocks 端口 (默认从 terraform.tfvars 读取 port)

password.description: Shadowsocks 密码 (默认从 terraform.tfvars 读取 password)
